attributes.description: Kafka Connect 已寫入 Elasticsearch 的商品事件總數。
attributes.title: 熱門商品 - 事件總數
attributes.visState: {"title":"熱門商品 - 事件總數","type":"metric","params":{"addTooltip":true,"addLegend":false,"type":"metric","metric":{"percentageMode":false,"useRanges":false,"colorSchema":"Green to Red","metricColorMode":"None","colorsRange":[{"from":0,"to":10000}],"labels":{"show":true},"style":{"bgFill":"#000","bgColor":false,"labelColor":false,"subText":"Kafka Connect 已寫入的事件","fontSize":48}}},"aggs":[{"id":"1","enabled":true,"type":"count","schema":"metric","params":{}}]}

attributes.description: 依事件類型切分的時間序列趨勢，用來觀察瀏覽、點擊、成功與失敗事件。
attributes.title: 熱門商品 - 事件類型趨勢
attributes.visState: {"title":"熱門商品 - 事件類型趨勢","type":"line","params":{"type":"line","grid":{"categoryLines":false},"categoryAxes":[{"id":"CategoryAxis-1","type":"category","position":"bottom","show":true,"style":{},"scale":{"type":"linear"},"labels":{"show":true,"truncate":100},"title":{}}],"valueAxes":[{"id":"ValueAxis-1","name":"LeftAxis-1","type":"value","position":"left","show":true,"style":{},"scale":{"type":"linear","mode":"normal"},"labels":{"show":true,"rotate":0,"filter":false,"truncate":100},"title":{"text":"事件數"}}],"seriesParams":[{"show":true,"type":"line","mode":"normal","data":{"label":"Count","id":"1"},"valueAxis":"ValueAxis-1","drawLinesBetweenPoints":true,"showCircles":true}],"addTooltip":true,"addLegend":true,"legendPosition":"right","times":[],"addTimeMarker":false},"aggs":[{"id":"1","enabled":true,"type":"count","schema":"metric","params":{}},{"id":"2","enabled":true,"type":"date_histogram","schema":"segment","params":{"field":"occurred_at","timeRange":{"from":"now-90m","to":"now"},"useNormalizedEsInterval":true,"interval":"auto","drop_partials":false,"min_doc_count":1,"extended_bounds":{}}},{"id":"3","enabled":true,"type":"terms","schema":"group","params":{"field":"event_type","orderBy":"1","order":"desc","size":5,"otherBucket":false,"missingBucket":false}}]}

attributes.description: 依五種熱門商品折價券事件類型統計事件數；總計應等於事件總數。
attributes.title: 熱門商品行為統計
attributes.visState: {"title":"熱門商品行為統計","type":"table","params":{"perPage":10,"showPartialRows":false,"showMetricsAtAllLevels":false,"showTotal":true,"totalFunc":"sum"},"aggs":[{"id":"1","enabled":true,"type":"count","schema":"metric","params":{}},{"id":"2","enabled":true,"type":"filters","schema":"bucket","params":{"filters":[{"input":{"query":"event_type: COUPON_VIEWED","language":"kuery"},"label":"活動頁瀏覽"},{"input":{"query":"event_type: PAGE_REFRESHED","language":"kuery"},"label":"頁面重新整理"},{"input":{"query":"event_type: WAITING_ROOM_JOINED","language":"kuery"},"label":"進入等候室"},{"input":{"query":"event_type: COUPON_CLAIM_SUCCEEDED","language":"kuery"},"label":"領券成功"},{"input":{"query":"event_type: COUPON_CLAIM_FAILED","language":"kuery"},"label":"領券失敗"}]}}]}

attributes.description: 使用者領券失敗的原因，例如售罄或限流；總計應等於領券失敗事件數。
attributes.title: 熱門商品 - 失敗原因

attributes.description: 高頻操作是指短時間內反覆重新整理頁面或多次領券失敗。這裡依 user_id 統計 PAGE_REFRESHED 與 COUPON_CLAIM_FAILED，作為排查線索，不代表 bot 偵測。
attributes.title: 熱門商品 - 高頻操作線索

attributes.description: 由 Kafka Connect Flatten SMT 產生的地區流量切分。
attributes.title: 熱門商品 - 地區流量

attributes.description: 依時間觀察折價券剩餘數量，協助判斷活動何時接近售罄與售罄。
attributes.title: 熱門商品 - 剩餘折價券變化

attributes.description: Kafka Connect demo dashboard：觀察熱門商品或限量折價券的流量、成功、失敗與庫存壓力。
